name: forma-storefront
description: FORMA editorial ecommerce storefront with Shopify, Supabase, Chatbase and Vercel integration hooks.

scripts.check: npm run verify:files && npm run smoke:static && npm run check:workspaces && node --check assets/integrations.js && node --check assets/store.js && node --check scripts/verify-files.js && node --check scripts/smoke-static.js && node --check scripts/smoke-app.js && ruby shopify-theme/spec/theme_structure_spec.rb
